output.code:
# Let's read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-QHZrsBJSDT6Kd4jvUjSnD5-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-QHZrsBJSDT6Kd4jvUjSnD5-text_to_analyse.txt", 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
# find indices of quotation marks "
indices = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(indices), indices[:20], indices[-10:]

pairs = list(zip(indices[::2], indices[1::2]))
pairs_texts = [(start, end, text[start+1:end]) for start, end in pairs]
pairs_texts

def context_before(start, n=120):
    s = start
    b = max(0, s-n)
    return text[b:s]

contexts = []
for i, (qstart, qend, qtxt) in enumerate(pairs_texts):
    ctx = context_before(qstart, 150)
    contexts.append((i+1, qtxt, ctx[-150:].replace('\n',' ')))
contexts

import json

pairs = list(zip(indices[::2], indices[1::2]))
spans = []
# manually assign citation type for each pair based on index
# (1) Aya, (2) Aya, (3-10) Hadeeth
for idx, (start_q, end_q) in enumerate(pairs, start=1):
    matn_start = start_q + 1
    matn_end = end_q  # exclusive
    matn_text = text[matn_start:matn_end]
    if idx in (1,2):
        ctype = "Aya"
    else:
        ctype = "Hadeeth"
    spans.append({
        "span_start": matn_start,
        "span_end": matn_end,
        "span_text": matn_text,
        "citation_type": ctype
    })

print(len(spans))
print(json.dumps({"citations": spans}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:1000])

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":161,"span_end":231,"span_text":"وَمَن يُشَاقِقِ اللَّـهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّـهَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":361,"span_end":454,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ كَفَرَ وَجَاءَ بِالْحَقِّ وَجَاءَ بِهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":606,"span_end":679,"span_text":"لا يُحِبُّ المُؤْمِنُ لِأَخِيهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِعلَ مُحَمَدٍ وَلا خِلَافَهُ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":821,"span_end":964,"span_text":"لا تُؤَمِّلوا الْمُؤَمِّلَاتِ وَلا تُحِبُّوا الْمُحِبَّاتِ وَلا تَكُفُّوا الْمُكَفِّفَاتِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَّدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1103,"span_end":1151,"span_text":"لا يُضُرُّكُمُ شَيءٌ حَتّى تُضَرُّوا أَنفُسَكُمْ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1293,"span_end":1413,"span_text":"وَالَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا مِن بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَزَيِّنْ وَجْهَنَا لِلْيَوْمِ الْأَخِرِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1554,"span_end":1607,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَّدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1746,"span_end":1799,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَّدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1938,"span_end":1991,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَّدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2130,"span_end":2183,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَّدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
